thinkpad_database.addons: Also as ThinkPad S2 Yoga Gen5

Display.multi_display: Supports up to 3 independent displays (native display and 2 external monitors via HDMI and USB-C)

memory.slots: Memory soldered to systemboard, no slots (4GB) or dual-channel (8GB/16GB)

display_options: 13.3" FHD (1920x1080) IPS multi-touch 300nits anti-reflection anti-smudge 72% NTSC
pen: ThinkPad Pen Pro, active pen for multi-touch display

storage.ssd_pcie: One drive, up to 512GB M.2 2242 SSD or 1TB M.2 2280 SSD, optional Intel Optane Memory, PCIe 3.0

Bluetooth.form: Integrated in Wi-Fi + Bluetooth combo adapter

Battary.tech: Integrated Li-Polymer, supports Rapid Charge (80% in 1hr) with 65W AC adapter

camera: Front 720p with ThinkShutter, fixed focus; rear 5.0MP autofocus
Front IR & 720p hybrid with ThinkShutter, fixed focus
Front IR & 720p hybrid with ThinkShutter, fixed focus; rear 5.0MP autofocus
audio: HD Audio, Synaptic CX11880 codec / stereo speakers, 2W x2, Dolby Audio Premium / dual array microphone
keyboard: 6-row, spill-resistant, multimedia Fn keys, LED backlight
TrackPoint pointing device and Mylar surface multi-touch touchpad
security: Touch style fingerprint reader on palm rest
Optional IR camera for Windows Hello
BIOS security: Power-on password, Supervisor password, Hard disk password, Self-healing BIOS
add_on_tips: EPEAT Gold, ENERGY STAR 8.0, TCO Certified
